title: Blockgame Profiles
description: A mod for PirateSoftware's Blockgame to help you use multiple profiles
body:
# Blockgame Profiles

A mod for Blockgame that enhances the talents screen to let you maintain and switch between multiple profiles.\
*This mod uses the same Minecraft version required by the Blockgame server.*

**This is an unofficial mod for Blockgame and is not affiliated with the Blockgame team.**

_NOTE: The goal of this mod is to eventually get merged into Jake's mod. This mod is for community testing before it is released on the main mod._

## Requirements

The following are required to run this mod:
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

In addition, the following mods are recommended:
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
